sentences.arabic: طَلَبَ الْمُدِيرُ مِنْ خَالِدٍ تَقْرِيرًا بَسِيطًا عَنِ الْعَمَلِ.
sentences.translation: Direktor je od Halida tražio jednostavan izvještaj o poslu.
sentences.translationEn: The manager asked Khalid for a simple report about the work.

sentences.arabic: جَلَسَ خَالِدٌ عَلَى مَكْتَبِهِ وَبَدَأَ يَكْتُبُ.
sentences.translation: Halid je sjeo za svoj sto i počeo pisati.
sentences.translationEn: Khalid sat at his desk and started writing.

sentences.arabic: كَتَبَ مَا حَقَّقَهُ الْفَرِيقُ خِلَالَ الْأُسْبُوعِ.
sentences.translation: Napisao je šta je tim postigao tokom sedmice.
sentences.translationEn: He wrote what the team achieved during the week.

sentences.arabic: أَرْسَلَ التَّقْرِيرَ إِلَى الْمُدِيرِ قَبْلَ نِهَايَةِ الْيَوْمِ.
sentences.translation: Poslao je izvještaj direktoru prije kraja dana.
sentences.translationEn: He sent the report to the manager before the end of the day.
